title: Hide Function Output
description: Adds a gamerule that hides function command feedback mentions
body:
A simple mixin mod that adds a gamerule and injects into the CommandFunction class to allow you to hide the command feedback for the /function command

## NOTE
This mod will not be updated to new versions, downgraded to earlier versions, or added to other modloaders, if you want this to happen you have my express permission to recreate this mod however you like using the source code.
